parents.subject: LU-0000 mdt: advertise EC parity support capability

commit.subject: LU-0000 lov: Basic support for creating EC layout
commit.message:
LU-0000 lov: Basic support for creating EC layout

This patch tries to make it possible to create EC'd layouts.

Test-Parameters: forjanitoronly
Signed-off-by: Patrick Farrell <pfarrell@whamcloud.com>
Change-Id: I9c23122d759b0541834b5f9b4b803a0664d8ee9a
